'''鈭歾h-p-w''' ('''zhapawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macroencapsulate|macroencapsulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macroencapsulate|macroencapsulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| zhapawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapawithi|zhapawithi]] || [[word:zhapawiji|zhapawiji]] || [[word:zhapawishi|zhapawishi]] || [[word:zhapawi|zhapawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapawuthuth|zhapawuthuth]] || [[word:zhapawujuj|zhapawujuj]] || [[word:zhapawushush|zhapawushush]] || [[word:zhapaw|zhapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapawuthu|zhapawuthu]] || [[word:zhapawuju|zhapawuju]] || [[word:zhapawushu|zhapawushu]] || [[word:zhapawu|zhapawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapawufuth|zhapawufuth]] || [[word:zhapawufuj|zhapawufuj]] || [[word:zhapawufush|zhapawufush]] || [[word:zhapawuf|zhapawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapawethe|zhapawethe]] || [[word:zhapaweje|zhapaweje]] || [[word:zhapaweshe|zhapaweshe]] || [[word:zhapawe|zhapawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapawothoth|zhapawothoth]] || [[word:zhapawojoj|zhapawojoj]] || [[word:zhapawoshosh|zhapawoshosh]] || [[word:zhapaw|zhapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapawotho|zhapawotho]] || [[word:zhapawojo|zhapawojo]] || [[word:zhapawosho|zhapawosho]] || [[word:zhapawo|zhapawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapawofoth|zhapawofoth]] || [[word:zhapawofoj|zhapawofoj]] || [[word:zhapawofosh|zhapawofosh]] || [[word:zhapawof|zhapawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhapaw忙th忙|zhapaw忙th忙]] || [[word:zhapaw忙j忙|zhapaw忙j忙]] || [[word:zhapaw忙sh忙|zhapaw忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhapaw忙|zhapaw忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapawathath|zhapawathath]] || [[word:zhapawajaj|zhapawajaj]] || [[word:zhapawashash|zhapawashash]] || [[word:zhapaw|zhapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapawatha|zhapawatha]] || [[word:zhapawaja|zhapawaja]] || [[word:zhapawasha|zhapawasha]] || [[word:zhapawa|zhapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapawafath|zhapawafath]] || [[word:zhapawafaj|zhapawafaj]] || [[word:zhapawafash|zhapawafash]] || [[word:zhapawaf|zhapawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhapawasha|zhapawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhapawasha|gozhapawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhapawasha|gokizhapawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhapawn眉sha|zhapawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhapawnkn眉sha|gozhapawnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapawn眉sha|gokizhapawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhapawsh毛sha|zhapawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhapawnksh毛sha|gozhapawnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhapawsh毛sha|gokizhapawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapawrosha|zhapawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapawnkrosha|gozhapawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapawrosha|gokizhapawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapawmusha|zhapawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapawnkmusha|gozhapawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapawmusha|gokizhapawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhapawsherasha|zhapawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhapawnksherasha|gozhapawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhapawsherasha|gokizhapawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhapawngasha|zhapawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhapawnkngasha|gozhapawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhapawngasha|gokizhapawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhapawyasha|zhapawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhapawnkyasha|gozhapawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhapawyasha|gokizhapawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhapawyamasha|zhapawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhapawnkyamasha|gozhapawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhapawyamasha|gokizhapawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapawn眉sh毛sha|zhapawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapawnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhapawnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapawn眉sh毛sha|gokizhapawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapawn眉rosha|zhapawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapawnkn眉rosha|gozhapawnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapawn眉rosha|gokizhapawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapawn眉musha|zhapawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapawnkn眉musha|gozhapawnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapawn眉musha|gokizhapawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapawsh毛n眉sha|zhapawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapawnksh毛n眉sha|gozhapawnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapawsh毛n眉sha|gokizhapawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapawsh毛rosha|zhapawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapawnksh毛rosha|gozhapawnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapawsh毛rosha|gokizhapawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapawsh毛musha|zhapawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapawnksh毛musha|gozhapawnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapawsh毛musha|gokizhapawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapawron眉sha|zhapawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapawnkron眉sha|gozhapawnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapawron眉sha|gokizhapawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapawrosh毛sha|zhapawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapawnkrosh毛sha|gozhapawnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapawrosh毛sha|gokizhapawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapawromusha|zhapawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapawnkromusha|gozhapawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapawromusha|gokizhapawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhapawmun眉sha|zhapawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhapawnkmun眉sha|gozhapawnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhapawmun眉sha|gokizhapawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhapawmush毛sha|zhapawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhapawnkmush毛sha|gozhapawnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhapawmush毛sha|gokizhapawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhapawmurosha|zhapawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhapawnkmurosha|gozhapawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhapawmurosha|gokizhapawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhapaw|zhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙p忙w|zh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhapaw|hozhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙p忙w|hozh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhapaw|hohozhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙p忙w|hohozh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhapaw|n眉zhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙p忙w|n眉zh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhapaw|n眉n眉zhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙p忙w|n眉n眉zh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhapaw|n茂zhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙p忙w|n茂zh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhapaw|n茂n茂zhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙p忙w|n茂n茂zh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhapaw|luzhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙p忙w|luzh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhapaw|luluzhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙p忙w|luluzh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhapaw|lizhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙p忙w|lizh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhapaw|lilizhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙p忙w|lilizh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhapaw|kozhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙p忙w|kozh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhapaw|kokozhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙p忙w|kokozh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhapaw|kezhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙p忙w|kezh忙p忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhapaw|kekezhapaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙p忙w|kekezh忙p忙w]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
